# PowerScriptFormula.LiteralValue property

The engine's IEEE-754 single-precision scalar for the slot — populated for trivial-numeric slots from the compiled-form float; NaN for expression slots (Phase 2 will resolve those library-side).

```csharp
public float LiteralValue { get; set; }
```
